reply_original: Hi there! We are so glad to hear that you are enjoying your time with Riko! She definitely has a unique charm that makes every conversation special. Your support means the world to our team. If you ever have suggestions or need help, feel free to reach out to support@fantachat.ai. Have more magical moments in Fantasia!
reply_zh: 你好！很高兴听到你喜欢与 Riko 度过的时光！她确实拥有一种独特的魅力，让每一次对话都变得与众不同。你的支持对我们的团队至关重要。如果你有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时联系 support@fantachat.ai。祝你在 Fantasia 拥有更多奇妙时刻！
